nasb.text: And the armies which are in heaven, clothed in fine linen, white and clean, were following Him on white horses.

esv.text: And the armies of heaven, arrayed in fine linen, white and pure, were following him on white horses.

cnv.text: 天上的眾軍，都騎著白馬，穿著潔白的細麻衣，跟隨著他。

ccb.text: 众天军穿着洁白的细麻衣，骑着白马跟随祂。

csbs.text: 天上的军兵，都骑着白马，身穿洁白干净的细麻衣，跟随着他。
